content:
## Overview

Example API Toolkit is a sample listing that shows how starter entries render across the directory, search index, and detail pages.

## Why it is included

This entry gives maintainers a safe default example for the template without carrying over product copy from a previous project.

## What to customize

- Swap the name, slug, and URL for your real listing
- Replace this long-form Markdown with the details you want on the public page
- Add resource links, media, or categories that match your own site

## Notes

Use this entry as a formatting reference only. It is intentionally generic.
description: Sample developer-tools listing used to demonstrate the starter data shape.
name: Example API Toolkit

content:
## Overview

Northwind Analytics is a sample analytics entry for teams that want to see how another category behaves before adding their own real data.

## Why it is included

The starter needs more than one listing so search, filtering, featured sections, and category pages can be verified during setup.

## What to customize

- Replace the summary with your own product or directory listing copy
- Point the website and resource links at your own properties
- Mark the entry featured only if it belongs in your default hero selection

## Notes

Keeping a neutral sample here makes the starter easier to rebrand safely.
description: Neutral sample analytics listing for validating category, search, and detail-page behavior.
name: Northwind Analytics

content:
## Overview

Harbor Cloud is a sample infrastructure listing that rounds out the default starter dataset with a second non-featured category.

## Why it is included

This entry helps verify that category pages, search results, and directory cards still behave correctly when the starter contains a small but varied dataset.

## What to customize

- Replace the placeholder copy with your actual listing details
- Update the categories if your directory uses a different taxonomy
- Add additional resource links if you want the card to demonstrate richer metadata

## Notes

The default starter only needs enough data to prove the template contract, not to act like a shipped catalog.
description: Neutral sample infrastructure listing for the starter dataset.
name: Harbor Cloud
